name: Dandy's World - Vore Bot
description:
A Dandy's World vore bot where YOU can decide what scenario's you wanna role out and do with whatever toon you like! Unfortunately twisteds aren't included since I feel like that would be too much for the bot in my opinion.

The OG artist is CherryCookie20 from Deviantart. Link is highlighted in blue if you wanna check out their art! It's pretty good.

⚠️ TW WARNING ⚠️: Vore

All hate comments will be deleted and you will get blocked by me. You saw the title and warning, so please leave and block the bot if you find vore disturbing/disgusting, really ain't hard.

I got slightly inspired by Hornraptorprox because their's is pretty good, but I wanted to make my own version with some other characters. Though I will say some events like Christmas and Easter for now will be left out though Halloween will be in EXCEPT Gourdy for obvious reasons. Also adding some toons will be purposely left out and I have no intentions of adding them to also keep token count from being too high, sooo yeah.

Description will be vague to keep token count down. Also added smut tag since idk maybe some stuff can be suggestive? I would've added dead dove too if I had room for it.

TOONS I HAVE RIGHT NOW:

MAINS:

Vee: Pred (Hard vore only.)

Sprout: Pred (Hard vore only.)

Astro: Prey and Pred but mostly Pred. (Soft vore only.)

Shelly: Prey and Pred but mostly Pred. (Will do soft and hard vore.)

LETHAL:

Dandy: Pred. (Hard vore only.)

Dyle: Pred. (Soft and hard vore. Only does soft when asked.)

NON-MAIN TOONS:

Blot: Prey and Pred but mostly Pred. (Will do soft and hard vore.)

Brusha: Pred. (Hard vore only.)

Looey: Prey and Pred but mostly Prey. (Will only do soft vore if asked.)

Yatta: Prey and Pred but mostly Pred. (Hard vore only.)

Shrimpo: Pred. (Hard vore only.)

Finn: Prey.

Cosmo: Prey.

Glisten: Prey and Pred but mostly Pred. (Will do soft and hard vore.)

Connie: Pred. (Will do soft and hard vore.)

Goob: Prey and Pred but mostly Pred. (Soft vore only.)

Scraps: Pred. (Hard vore only.)

EVENTS:

Eclipse: Pred. (Hard vore only.)

Soulvester: Pred. (Will do soft and hard vore, changes with depend on what you do.)

TOONS I PURPOSELY LEFT OUT: Brightney, Teagan, Tisha, Gigi, R&D, Poppy, Boxten, Flutter, Toodles (for obvious reasons), Pebbles (same reasons for Toodles), Rodger, Ribecca along with Christmas and Easter toons. I have no intentions of adding them right now.

This will most likely work better with proxy since it has a high token count, even when I tried to dumb down everything, dang.

Adding that sometimes vore won't start right away depending what scenario you do, so you can truly do whatever, but this bot is intended for vore, but if it for whatever reason never mentions it, try to put it in chat memory or add more detail to your message.

Always hope any vore lovers enjoy this bot! ^^
creator: MeistroFan
